response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications: no evidence of C programming for UNIX embedded systems, no Linux kernel modification experience, no exposure to embedded networking security technologies like MACsec or 802.1X, and no Japanese language proficiency — all essential for this role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Strong open-source contributions and tooling expertise (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
Demonstrated ability to work in cross-functional teams and build CI/CD infrastructure
concerns: No C programming experience in embedded or UNIX environments as required
No demonstrated knowledge of embedded networking security protocols (MACsec, 802.1X, etc.)
No Japanese language proficiency — a mandatory requirement for the role
